arts.ttl: Celtic vs Bayern Munich – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Celtic welcome German giants Bayern Munich to Glasgow this evening in the Champions League play-offs. Brendan Rodgers’ side avoided immediate elimination from the tournament by a single point despite losing to Aston Villa on matchday eight. James Forrest is the only player expected to miss out with the Scotsman dealing with a foot injury.
